metadata.description: Vibe Doc — AI-powered documentation gap analyzer for modern codebases. Scans your project, classifies it, identifies missing technical documentation, and generates professional docs from your existing artifacts.

plugins.name: vibe-doc
plugins.description: Vibe Doc — AI-powered documentation gap analyzer and generator. Dual-layer: conversational skills (scan, generate, check, status) and a CLI (vibe-doc). Autonomous-first generate flow reads your project files and synthesizes docs before asking for input.
